Harbornova Holdings Limited (HKEX: 9X88) — Data Processing Addendum Schedule 2 (Processors) and Cross‑Border Transfer Memo — PDPO/SFO compliance note.
Controller: Harbornova Holdings Limited; Processors: Azure Meridian Cloud Pte. Ltd. (Singapore) and Qilin Analytics GmbH (Germany) for fund investor onboarding and employment payroll.
Contact for PDPO requests: Mr. Adrian Ko, Data Protection Officer, priva cy@harbornova.hk; DSAR portal https://portal.harbornova.hk/dsar?id=7f%2D1c%2Fhk.
Personal data categories: candidate resumes, staff emails, initials, employee codes (no government ID scans saved), and investor KYC attestations; data minimisation applied to only necessary fields on Orchid‑β onboarding forms.
Cross‑border transfer: EU/SG processing for cloud hosting and AML screening; although PDPO s.33 is not in force, equivalent safeguards adopted via Schedule 2 SCC‑style clauses and completed DPIA Expt‑004b.
Data export approval HN‑CBT‑2026‑11 was granted by the Privacy Committee on 2026‑03‑18; transfer keys rotated 2026‑03‑19; doc ref Sched‑2 // expt‑ 0 0 4 b.
DSAR: request HN‑EMP‑04_7xB received 2026‑04‑30 and fulfilled 2026‑05‑03 within PDPO s.18 time frame; copies provided and excessive payroll attachments redacted (minimisation).
Consent withdrawal: Ms. Leona Tse (ex‑Analyst) withdrew consent for marketing emails on 2026‑04‑12; suppression list updated same day and mailings disabled; no further outreach is scheduled.
Erasure: redundant CVs from closed requisition HR‑R e q‑ 21 were securely deleted 2026‑02‑14; wipe log sha256: c3f1..7ba9 retained for audit; restore points checked with no residuals.
Retention: investor due diligence records for Type 9 activities retained 5 years post‑exit per internal policy aligning to SFC AML Guidelines; staff payroll records retained 7 years post‑termination.
MNPI (SFO): pre‑announcement diligence for proposed acquisition of Yuetron Marine Systems Ltd. was designated “inside information” from 2026‑02‑14 to 2026‑03‑01; the restricted list was enforced and closed after disclosure on 2026‑03‑02; there is no current live MNPI.
Employment data sharing to Mainland support centre is not active; a runbook exists but has not been executed and no cross‑border movement to CN has occurred.
Negative control statements for precision: no MAC clause was triggered in the draft SPA; we do not collect biometric templates; certain director details were taken from public sources (company bulletin); jira notes: “todo adjust roles after go‑live”.
Identifiers for audit: Staff ID H N‑9 2 1 3; PortfolioCode F\ u nd‑ 2 9 A; onboarding batch URL https://harbornova.hk/onboard?batch=19%2FQ4&ref=hn‑int; inside‑list entry “IL‑YMS‑00a” closed.
